Open `Start Research` now.

This does not create a project immediately. It first opens a large intake box where you describe the task clearly:

- research goal or benchmark context
- available papers, code, data, baselines, or reviewer comments
- runtime limits such as GPU, time, network, privacy, and external APIs
- desired outputs such as a trusted baseline, improved experiments, figures, report, or paper draft

You can send the request to SetupAgent, or click manual autonomous to open the full Context Form.
